nasb.text: ‘If a countryman of yours becomes so poor with regard to you that he sells himself to you, you shall not subject him to a slave’s service.

esv.text: “If your brother becomes poor beside you and sells himself to you, you shall not make him serve as a slave:

cnv.text: “你的兄弟在你那裡若是貧窮了，賣身給你，你不可逼他作奴僕的工作。

ccb.text: “如果你们的同胞穷得把自己卖给你们，不可把他当作奴隶，
